positive: A stylized, clean silhouette design featuring a majestic woodland creature, specifically a fox, leaping through a mystical autumnal grove. The fox should be depicted in a highly graphic, simplified style, reminiscent of mid-century modern vector art mixed with Japanese woodblock prints. Focus on strong, clean lines and high contrast. The surrounding environment should include stylized falling maple leaves and subtle branches, creating a harmonious, circular, central composition suitable for placement on a t-shirt. Use a limited, rich color palette of deep burnt orange, forest green, charcoal black, and cream, ensuring the design remains visually punchy and legible even when scaled. Vector graphic aesthetic, sticker art style, high detail, crisp edges, flat design.
negative: blur, watermark, signature, logo, text, low resolution, artifacts, jpeg artifacts, poor composition, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, messy details, cluttered, noise
